name: EDM minor-loop harmony (illustrative)
description: A small, HAND-AUTHORED sketch of two harmonic tendencies common to loop-based electronic dance music (trance, progressive, etc.) in a natural-minor key: it stays inside the diatonic minor collection, and it moves with smooth common-tone voice-leading (the sustained-pad feel). It is deliberately all-SOFT — a style is a bundle of tendencies, not laws — and it demonstrates the gap-B harmony family. IMPORTANT: this is illustrative, not authoritative. A real trance style is a CORPUS-DERIVED profile (induce_rules over a corpus of trance MIDIs, plus the sampleable transition distributions of gap 14) with provenance, not a hand guess — that is the 'style profile' this file only gestures at. Evaluate with chords=[[root, quality], ...] and key=[tonic, 'minor'].
